---
name: Test Coverage Request
about: Request new test coverage for a feature or flow
title: '[TEST] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature to Test
Which feature or user flow needs test coverage?

## Why Is Coverage Needed?
Explain the risk or reason this should be tested.

## Suggested Test Scenarios
List the scenarios you think should be covered:

- [ ] Happy path: 
- [ ] Negative case: 
- [ ] Edge case: 

## Test Type
- [ ] E2E / BDD
- [ ] API
- [ ] Visual Regression
- [ ] Accessibility

## Acceptance Criteria
What does done look like for this test request?

## Additional Context
Any related tickets, designs, or documentation.
